_comment: Local AWS access portal config. Copy to scripts/aws-portal.json (gitignored) to customize. Account IDs are read from the named env var in your .env (get_env, same as accounts.hcl) so nothing secret is committed to this public repo. management_account_id + identity_center_start_url are optional (display/links only). Colors are 6-hex (AWS switch-role console banner).
